description_long: This object is a modern rifle with a sleek, elongated barrel and a tactical design, primarily finished in matte black. The rifle features a collapsible or adjustable stock at the rear, which is angular and ergonomic for shoulder support. The central body includes a prominent magazine well with a detachable box magazine inserted, and a pistol grip for secure handling. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a cylindrical suppressor or muzzle device. The upper receiver appears to have a flat top, possibly for mounting optics, but no visible sighting system is attached. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary tactical rifles.
description: A modern, matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, long barrel, and detachable box magazine. Features a cylindrical muzzle device and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and cylindrical muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow barrel and muzzle device, with minimal visible detail except the round profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, grip, magazine, and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the magazine and grip mostly obscured.
